records.title: Publish ADRs through coordinated public projections and restricted complete bodies
records.normalized_publication_statement: Each approved ADR shall retain one identifier and one decision while being represented by an abstract public projection and, where needed, a complete restricted body. The representations are coordinated publication views, not competing ADRs, and the public build shall not consume the restricted representation.

records.title: Use closed per-register schemas for public structured projections
records.normalized_publication_statement: Every machine-readable public register shall conform to a dedicated closed-world projection schema and an explicit projection class. Structural validity is necessary but insufficient; publication also requires semantic and security review, and no build may fall back to redacting complete canonical or restricted records.
